case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ERWIN MACKEY et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-05-2007 VACATED. COMM. SUE KAPLAN, CLERK KARISSA SHAW, NOT REPORTED. (218)
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MACKEY, ERWIN

APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ERWIN MACKEY'S HEARING ON WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DETERMINED THAT APPLICANT IS ABLE TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. ERWIN MACKEY HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERK: V.
